comment: tactical-violent bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical. RE-BASELINED in batch 11 (the complete-ogre + heal-scarcity combat-balance MAJOR; human sign-off 2026-07-22/23). The batch's tuning target is competent violence ~50%, and it landed at win_pct 46 (2339/5000 = 46.8%). Final tuning values (src/games/contractor.rs BALANCE + the OGRE MonsterDef row): OGRE retaliation 6 (guaranteed hit-back the instant you attack an ogre), OGRE awe_threshold 3, loot_count_per_depth 1 (was 2 — this is the golden-changing heal-scarcity lever), potion UseEffect::Heal 3 (was 8), hp_gain_per_depth 3 (was 4). NOTE for future tuners: cutting the potion-vs-sword DRAW rate (loot_potion_num/den) BACKFIRES — a slot that doesn't roll a potion rolls a SWORD, so fewer potions just means more offense; loot_potion_num stayed 3/4 and real heal scarcity came from fewer total items + smaller heals + ogre retaliation instead. Also: raising retaliation alone has diminishing returns (the bot routes around / awe-spares ogres rather than dying to them). Measured: wins 2339/5000 (46.8%), deaths_combat 2581, deaths_dark 80, stuck 0, kills 89783, spared 2242 (genuine sustained-hold awe-spares, not the retreat exploit fixed in T2). Band brackets the measured value with regression headroom. Batch 12's light-as-grace will move these again under its own sign-off. Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
